author: pyrochlore
description: Track occurrences and numbers in your notes.

manifest.author: pyrochlore
manifest.description: A plugin tracks occurrences and numbers in your notes
manifest.name: Tracker

name: Tracker

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/534
* Bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/527
* Fix #280: Add searchType: frontmatter.exists for tracking field existence by @mikegreiner in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/538


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.18.0...1.19.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix #497: Support all days for startWeekOn parameter by @mikegreiner in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/536
* Fix #324: Handle numeric YAML parsing for startDate/endDate with YYYYMMDD format by @mikegreiner in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/539
* Add feature #420: searchType for frontmatter keys containing lists by @curious-archaea in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/542
* Updated dependencies

## New Contributors
* @mikegreiner made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/536
* @curious-archaea made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/542

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.17.0...1.18.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Adding a feature : Increase color intensity based on streak by @Lokesh-Bharath in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/478
* Update dependencies


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.16.0...1.17.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Adding thresholdType parameter to Calendars by @Lokesh-Bharath in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/457
* Enable bar chart full-bar display at beginning and end by @xychang in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/466
* Update dependencies

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.15.1...1.16.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bump rollup from 4.29.1 to 4.31.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/418
* Bump jsep from 1.3.8 to 1.4.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/409
* Bump tslib from 2.6.3 to 2.8.1 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/406
* Fix issue #298: Added DatasetName as title for calendar in annotation mode by @Lokesh-Bharath in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/432
* Resolve scaling issue when navigating between monthly views (#169) by @Lokesh-Bharath in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/433
* Bump @types/node from 20.14.11 to 22.13.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/435
* Bump rollup from 4.31.0 to 4.34.8 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/434
* Bump typescript from 5.7.2 to 5.7.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/423
* Bump @rollup/plugin-typescript from 11.1.6 to 12.1.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/407
* Bump @rollup/plugin-node-resolve from 15.3.1 to 16.0.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/408

## New Contributors
* @Lokesh-Bharath made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/432

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.15.0...1.15.1

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: Minor spelling error in Examples.md by @calebvisage in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/399
* Added new expression functions - First and Last by @chapost1 in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/398
* Updated dates in examples to fix plots by @denissok in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/396
* Respect thresholds in scaled months by @mkarrmann in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/365
* Update dependencies

## New Contributors
* @calebvisage made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/399
* @chapost1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/398
* @denissok made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/396
* @mkarrmann made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/365

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.14.0...1.15.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Prevent overlapping external labels in pie chart by @xychang in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/352
* Enable Stacked Bar Chart #enhancement by @xychang in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/351
* Update dependencies

## New Contributors
* @xychang made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/352

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.13.3...1.14.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix typo in TestExpression.md by @lulunac27a in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/313
* Fix typo in FinanceTracker.md by @Mr-Dionysus in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/325
* Update main.ts - use new format for {{average}} by @mtomas7 in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/335

## New Contributors
* @lulunac27a made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/313
* @Mr-Dionysus made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/325
* @mtomas7 made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/335

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.13.2...1.13.3

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update dependencies
* Fix typo in README.md by @prolenodev in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/286
* Change streak counts to terminate on falsey values rather than null by @souponaroom in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/304

## New Contributors
* @prolenodev made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/286
* @souponaroom made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/304

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.13.1...1.13.2

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix packaging script

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.13.0...1.13.1

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Support for inline dataview fields by @Laharah in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/196
* Added support for emoji values in dataview fields
* Updated dependencies

## New Contributors
* @Laharah made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/196

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.12.0...1.13.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add aspect ratio parameter for graphs by @woodworker in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/239

## New Contributors
* @woodworker made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/239

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.11.0...1.12.0

releases.author: lazyguru
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Parse booleans from the frontmatter (fixes #79) by @bnjbvr in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/177
* Fix a typo by @channingwalton in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/166
* Update Questions.md by @generic-user in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/127
* Rename TestMultipleTargesMultipleValues.md to TestMultipleTargetsMult… by @Gnopps in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/124
* Update TestXDataset.md by @ianhakes in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/217
* Fix link to scaling/positioning docs by @gma in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/209
* Fix table formatting of `margin` row by @huyz in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/160
* Fix searchType: `task` by @huyz in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/158

## New Contributors
* @bnjbvr made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/177
* @channingwalton made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/166
* @generic-user made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/127
* @Gnopps made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/124
* @ianhakes made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/217
* @gma made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/209
* @huyz made their first contribution in https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/pull/160

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pyrochlore/obsidian-tracker/compare/1.10.9...1.11.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Replace tab characters by spaces
- Accept more unicode characters in dvField
- Allow emojis in the folder path
- Fixed bugs
releases.name: v1.10.9

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed startDat/endDate misread as a relative date
releases.name: v1.10.8

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Allow using html image tags as emoji inputs
releases.name: v1.10.7

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed the coloring for missing data in the month view
releases.name: v1.10.6

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Allow using a relative date value in `initMonth` in the month view
releases.name: v1.10.5

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Allow using a regular expression as a key of the parameter `textValueMap`
- Add a parameter `shiftOnlyValueLargerThan` to determine when to do `valueShift`
- Fixed bugs reported by users
- Fixed typo in plugin settings
releases.name: v1.10.4

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Allow using the parameter `fitPanelWidth` with the output type `month` and `pie`
- Fixed the resizing and positioning of the chart tooltip
releases.name: v1.10.3

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed plugin not rendering on some macOS machines
releases.name: v1.10.2

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed 'failed to load plugin' on iOS
releases.name: v1.10.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add annotation mode for month view
- Add parameters `xAxisTickInterval`, `yAxisTickInterval`, `xAxisTickLabelFormat` and `yAxisTickLabelFormat` for the line and bar chart
- Allow using regular expression in parameter `dateFormatPrefix` and `dateFormatSuffix`
- Add parameters `file`, `specifiedFilesOnly`, `fileContainsLinkedFiles`, and `fileMultiplierAfterLink` to retrieve data from specified files
- Add a parameter `textValueMap` to convert texts or emojis to specified values
- Fixed bugs
- Enhanced error messages
releases.name: v1.10.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Allow using seconds in time values
- Fixed error parsing `dvField`
releases.name: v1.9.2

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Fixed errors on collecting time values from `dvField`
- Fixed errors on collecting wiki while fileCache.links is undefined
releases.name: v1.9.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add a new output type `pie`, rendering a pie chart
- Allow expressions (operators and functions) as data inputs for output type `summary`, `bullet`, and `pie`
- Allow formatting evaluated expressions by a following format string
releases.name: v1.9.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed tasks searching not working for multiple targets
releases.name: v1.8.2

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Fixed bugs while using month view with parameter `xDataset`
releases.name: v1.8.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add a new `searchType` `task`, retrieving data from tasks
- Enhancement
    - Month view
        - Add parameter `circleColorByValue` to show color based on the value
        - Support multiple targets (dataset), change the dataset by clicking the header 
        - Add a button to show current month
    - Accept ISO-8601 date as `dateFormat`
    - Relative date input for `startDate` and `endDate`
- Fixed missing dvField values at the last line of files
releases.name: v1.8.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add a new output type 'month', rendering a month view for a given dataset
- Fixed bugs
releases.name: v1.7.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Add new targets 'numWords', 'numChars', and 'numSentences' for input type 'fileMeta'
releases.name: v1.6.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add a new input type 'fileMeta', getting meta data from a file
- Add a new output type 'bullet', rendering a bullet chart
- Enhancement
    - Accept tracking time values
    - Allow tracking nested values from front matter
    - Allow using dataset with date values as xDataset
    - Add more template variables
    - Allow parsing date in wiki brackets
- Fixed bugs
releases.name: v1.6.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Fixed labels not shown in light theme
- Enhanced error handling for searchType 'table'
releases.name: v1.5.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- New searchType 'table', searching records from a given table
- New searchType 'dvField', searching the inline fields used with Dataview plugin
- Enhance multiple values extraction
    - Allow using multiple values in searchType 'text'
    - Allow using array values in searchType 'frontmatter'
    - Allow using multiple values in searchType 'dvField'
    - Allow using multiple values in searchType 'table'
    - Allow using custom separator for multiple values extraction
- Improve performance
- Reduce package size
releases.name: v1.5.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description: - Enhanced error handling
releases.name: v1.4.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Add a new parameter (fixedScale) for the scaling of the output chart
- Add a new parameter (fitPanelWidth) to enable/disable the auto-scaling of the output chart
- Add a new parameter (margin) to help to position the chart
- Tested in Obsidian mobile app on iPhone and iPad
- Fixed bugs
releases.name: v1.4.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Support reading and rendering multiple targets
- Support reading and rendering multiple values (a tuple of values) under a target
- New output type 'bar', rendering a bar chart
- Add a legend for the chart output
- Fixed bugs
releases.name: v1.3.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Fixed files with the specified dateFormat are not recognized
- Restored the plugin's settings panel for dateFormat and folder
releases.name: v1.2.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Enable using regular expression in text searching
- New search type 'frontmatter', searching for key-value pairs in the front matter
- New search type 'wiki', searching for wiki links
- Reduced package size
releases.name: v1.2.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- New output type 'summary'
- Add commands help create Tracker code blocks
- Relaxed the regex for searching tags, allow tags embedded in sentences
- Fixed issues
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Fixed the searching of nested tag in frontmatter
- Reduced the package size by using Obsidian internal module
releases.name: v1.0.2

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Remove dependencies to Node.js modules
- Add example markdown files
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: pyrochlore
releases.description:
- Track simple tags, value-attached tags, and texts using code blocks
- Represent the tracked data in a customizable line chart
- Allow tracking in-line tags and tags in frontmatter
- Allow tracking nested tags
releases.name: Initial Release
